sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka nuam hi, Pasian innkuan sungah ka om zo.,
A sisan siangtho in kei hongsil siangzo,
Zeisu tawh luahkhawm zo, Hih mun ka om lai hang,
Ka nuam hi Pasian innkuan sungah ka om zo.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka sanggampa ka sanggamnu ci in ih kisam,
Eite Pasian sungah innkuan khat ih hih man in,
Gimthuak khat ih omciang, ih kithuakpih ciat a,
A gualzo khat ih omciang, ih ki lungdampih hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tagah te innpan kipan in, Kumpi inn dong in,
Hong ki deidan tuanlo in, lathak kasa theihi,
Siatna pan hoihna ah. Zawnna pan hauhna ah
Kilawm lopi'n hiah ka om, Ka Pasian min kaphat.
